'''âm-th-b''' ('''kamathab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaake|quaake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaake|quaake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-th-b
|-
! Lemma
| kamathab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathab|thimathab]] || [[word:jimathab|jimathab]] || [[word:shimathab|shimathab]] || [[word:kimathab|kimathab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathab|thuthumathab]] || [[word:jujumathab|jujumathab]] || [[word:shushumathab|shushumathab]] || [[word:kukumathab|kukumathab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumathab|thumathab]] || [[word:jumathab|jumathab]] || [[word:shumathab|shumathab]] || [[word:kumathab|kumathab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumathab|thumathab]] || [[word:jumathab|jumathab]] || [[word:shumathab|shumathab]] || [[word:kumathab|kumathab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themathab|themathab]] || [[word:jemathab|jemathab]] || [[word:shemathab|shemathab]] || [[word:kemathab|kemathab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomathab|thothomathab]] || [[word:jojomathab|jojomathab]] || [[word:shoshomathab|shoshomathab]] || [[word:kokomathab|kokomathab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomathab|thomathab]] || [[word:jomathab|jomathab]] || [[word:shomathab|shomathab]] || [[word:komathab|komathab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomathab|thomathab]] || [[word:jomathab|jomathab]] || [[word:shomathab|shomathab]] || [[word:komathab|komathab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚmathab|thĂŚmathab]] || [[word:jĂŚmathab|jĂŚmathab]] || [[word:shĂŚmathab|shĂŚmathab]] || [[word:kĂŚmathab|kĂŚmathab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamathab|thathamathab]] || [[word:jajamathab|jajamathab]] || [[word:shashamathab|shashamathab]] || [[word:kakamathab|kakamathab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamathab|thamathab]] || [[word:jamathab|jamathab]] || [[word:shamathab|shamathab]] || [[word:kamathab|kamathab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamathab|thamathab]] || [[word:jamathab|jamathab]] || [[word:shamathab|shamathab]] || [[word:kamathab|kamathab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamathab|shamathab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamathab|goshamathab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamathab|gokishamathab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamathabnĂź|shamathabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamathabnknĂź|goshamathabnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathabnĂź|gokishamathabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamathabshĂŤ|shamathabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamathabnkshĂŤ|goshamathabnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamathabshĂŤ|gokishamathabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathabro|shamathabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathabnkro|goshamathabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathabro|gokishamathabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathabmu|shamathabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathabnkmu|goshamathabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathabmu|gokishamathabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamathabsher|shamathabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamathabnksher|goshamathabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamathabsher|gokishamathabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamathabng|shamathabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamathabnkng|goshamathabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamathabng|gokishamathabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamathabya|shamathabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamathabnkya|goshamathabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamathabya|gokishamathabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamathabyam|shamathabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamathabnkyam|goshamathabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamathabyam|gokishamathabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathabnĂźshĂŤ|shamathabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathabnknĂźshĂŤ|goshamathabnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathabnĂźshĂŤ|gokishamathabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathabnĂźro|shamathabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathabnknĂźro|goshamathabnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathabnĂźro|gokishamathabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathabnĂźmu|shamathabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathabnknĂźmu|goshamathabnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathabnĂźmu|gokishamathabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathabshĂŤnĂź|shamathabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathabnkshĂŤnĂź|goshamathabnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathabshĂŤnĂź|gokishamathabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathabshĂŤro|shamathabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathabnkshĂŤro|goshamathabnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathabshĂŤro|gokishamathabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathabshĂŤmu|shamathabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathabnkshĂŤmu|goshamathabnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathabshĂŤmu|gokishamathabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathabronĂź|shamathabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathabnkronĂź|goshamathabnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathabronĂź|gokishamathabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathabroshĂŤ|shamathabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathabnkroshĂŤ|goshamathabnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathabroshĂŤ|gokishamathabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathabromu|shamathabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathabnkromu|goshamathabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathabromu|gokishamathabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathabmunĂź|shamathabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathabnkmunĂź|goshamathabnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathabmunĂź|gokishamathabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathabmushĂŤ|shamathabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathabnkmushĂŤ|goshamathabnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathabmushĂŤ|gokishamathabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathabmuro|shamathabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathabnkmuro|goshamathabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathabmuro|gokishamathabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
